skip_reason: Backend service at localhost:3001 offline — dynamic testing unavailable

escalations.title: Handlebars.js JavaScript Injection via AST Type Confusion
escalations.summary: Code injection via template AST type confusion if user-supplied template strings reach Handlebars.compile()

escalations.title: protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution via Malformed .proto Files
escalations.summary: RCE if .proto files originate from untrusted network input; orchestrator runs at elevated privilege managing Docker
escalations.fix: npm update protobufjs (>=7.5.5) in orchestrator and portal/Backend

escalations.title: as any cast on dependency PATCH body in DependencyPicker — potential injection via untyped payload
escalations.summary: blocked_by missing from UpdateFeatureRequestInput/UpdateBugInput; as any cast silences type checker on PATCH bodies — confirm no injection risk on the server-side PATCH handler
escalations.fix: Add blocked_by to portal/Shared/api.ts types; remove as any casts; security team validate PATCH handler input validation

escalations.title: teamDispatches.ts bypasses service layer with direct DB access, no input validation
escalations.summary: Route handler calls DB directly (no service layer), defines inline types, has 0 Verifies comments — data sensitivity and injection surface unknown
escalations.fix: Extract teamDispatchService.ts; add input validation; security team assess data sensitivity of team dispatch records

p1_findings.title: Handlebars.js JavaScript Injection via AST Type Confusion
p1_findings.recommendation: npm update handlebars >=4.7.9; audit template input sources

p1_findings.title: protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution via Malformed .proto Files
p1_findings.recommendation: npm update protobufjs >=7.5.5; validate .proto file sources

p2_findings.title: FR-dependency-search route not implemented in Source/
p2_findings.recommendation: Create Source/Backend/src/routes/search.ts; register in app.ts; test contract already defined in search.test.ts

p2_findings.title: blocked_by missing from portal API types; as any cast in DependencyPicker
p2_findings.recommendation: Add blocked_by to UpdateFeatureRequestInput and UpdateBugInput; remove as any casts

p2_findings.title: portal dependency seed.ts does not exist — demo data incomplete
p2_findings.recommendation: Create portal/Backend/src/database/seed.ts with idempotent seeding; wire into index.ts after schema init

p2_findings.title: portal DependencySection and BlockedBadge tests absent
p2_findings.recommendation: Create test files with Verifies: FR-dependency-section and FR-dependency-blocked-badge comments

p2_findings.title: Traceability enforcer only validates FR-WF-001-013; 89+ portal FRs unvalidated
p2_findings.recommendation: Add enforcer invocation for --plan dev-workflow-platform; update CLAUDE.md verification gate; consider scanning all requirements.md files

p2_findings.title: 29 phantom FR-0001 Verifies in portal shared dependency components
p2_findings.recommendation: Replace FR-0001 with correct IDs: FR-dependency-blocked-badge, FR-dependency-section, FR-dependency-picker

p2_findings.title: FR-090-095 referenced in portal but undefined in any spec/plan
p2_findings.recommendation: Create Plans/orchestrator-runs/requirements.md defining FR-090-095; or map to nearest existing FR

p2_findings.title: teamDispatches.ts: 0 Verifies, direct DB call in route handler, inline type definition
p2_findings.recommendation: Add Verifies comments; extract TeamDispatch type to portal/Shared/types.ts; introduce teamDispatchService.ts; add test

p2_findings.title: path-to-regexp ReDoS — malicious route pattern hangs event loop
p2_findings.recommendation: npm update express to >=4.22.0 across all services

p2_findings.title: picomatch ReDoS via extglob quantifiers in glob patterns
p2_findings.recommendation: npm update picomatch anymatch micromatch readdirp to latest

p2_findings.title: Vite dev server path traversal in .map file handling — source code disclosure
p2_findings.recommendation: npm update vite to >=5.4+ (stable series); coordinate with vitest upgrade

p2_findings.title: uuid missing buffer bounds check — CWE-787 out-of-bounds write
p2_findings.recommendation: npm update uuid to >=14.0.0 across all services (major version — verify API compat)

p3_findings.title: FR-070-076 ID collision between orchestrator-cycle-dashboard and image-upload plans
FR-TMP-001-010 (tiered merge pipeline) — zero implementation coverage
Duplicate test files for WorkItemDetailPage and WorkItemListPage
esbuild origin check bypass — source disclosure in dev
Express 4.x across all backends — Express 5.x available
vitest/vite version misalignment across portal services
OpenTelemetry 0.47→0.215 in portal/Backend — 170+ versions behind
p3_findings.note: Treat as P2.5 if distributed tracing is critical to observability

p4_findings.title: DebugPortalPage.tsx uses free-text Verifies comment, not a valid FR-ID
No conflicting major versions of critical packages in lock files
No post-install scripts — zero supply chain execution risk on npm install
License compliance PASS — MIT/Apache-2.0 only, no GPL detected

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Missing service layer + no input validation in route handlers
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Introduce teamDispatchService.ts with validated input; audit all Handlebars template sources

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Phantom / undefined requirement IDs in Verifies comments
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Update traceability enforcer to scan all plan dirs + renumber/define missing FRs

cross_reference_map.root_cause: ReDoS via unvalidated regex/glob pattern input
cross_reference_map.single_fix: npm update express picomatch — single dependency upgrade sprint clears both vectors
Upgrade protobufjs + add blocked_by to portal/Shared/api.ts — eliminates untyped deserializer and the as any workaround
Single dependency-feature completion sprint: search route + seed.ts + portal component tests
